chunks.title: The Queen of Sheba Visits Solomon
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit covering the queen's arrival, her testing of Solomon, her speech of praise, and her departure.

chunks.title: Solomon's Wealth and Global Influence
chunks.reason: A continuous section cataloging the annual gold income, royal treasures, military strength, and tribute from foreign nations.

chunks.title: Solomon's Military and Trade Empire
chunks.reason: A concluding segment detailing the specific organization of chariots and horses, their abundance in Jerusalem, and the export trade.
